title: Consistemplates
description: Texture pack that re-makes smithing templates.
body:
![In game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e68e58a8ec288400a8bf83d0c184651898e0bf4c.webp)


When playing Minecraft, one may find that the armor trims and netherite upgrade have a very different look to them, both being shown from different angles. This texture pack seeks to fix that.

Consistemplates is a texture pack with the purpose of re-spriting the smithing templates, both armor trims and upgrades, in order for them to both share consistency between one another.

One of the goals of the pack is to be as compatible as possible with other mods, so if there's mods you'd like to see this texture pack include, feel free to mention them.

Huge thanks to Alganaut for helping not only with a huge chunk of the art, but also with compiling and formatting the texture pack itself and coming up with the name.
